economic_notes: Three government business enterprises: Cascade Lower Canyon Community Forest LP (33%), Smemela:lh Group Management Ltd. (100%), Stelmexw Enterprises LP (99%). Two consolidated subsidiaries: Y.F.N. Developments Inc. and Yale First Nation Community Trust.
notes: Audit is qualified due to exclusion of budgeted information (not a going concern issue). Two fully consolidated subsidiaries (Y.F.N. Developments Inc. and Yale First Nation Community Trust) and three GBEs accounted for by modified equity method. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $1,724,580 + FNHA $409,151 + CMHC $351,057 + Other government funding $493,797 + DFO $368,764 + Province of BC $180,961 + Pacific Salmon Commission $97,931 + New Relationship Trust $0 = $3,625,241; however segmented data shows other government at $1,930,468 vs individual line items summing to $3,655,293 — used sum of individually named government revenue lines. OSR calculated as total revenue minus total government transfers. Administration & Education segment combines both functions. No remuneration schedule included in the financial statements provided. Special Projects segment expenses $203,413; Other Programs $259,470 (includes amortization).
